'''Katorr''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|world]], the fourth and last planet in the [[Adumar system/Legends|Katorrs system]]. The [[Star system/Legends|star system]], which also contained [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]], was located within the region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].

{{Planet-stub}}
